description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.8 Docker image and defines a PIP_CACHE_DIR variable pointing to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/pip-cache. Set a global before_script to run python -V and configure a cache keyed by $CI_PROJECT_ID that stores $CI_PROJECT_DIR/pip-cache. Add a test job in the default test stage that executes pip install -U pip setuptools, pip install -e .[test], and tox. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs pip install -U pip setuptools, pip install -e .[docs], make docs, and mv build/sphinx/html/ public/, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
